original: a complex array of rags, straps and pouches fashioned from ruddy cloth. Similar, if more revealing, to what many of Novahome’s Raskvel wear. While surprisingly comfortable and easy to move around in, this getup provides makes no attempts to cover your groin or chest, letting everything hang free.
